core_mechanism: Bayesian inversion of a known conservation-law (first-order advection/transport) PDE to infer a latent, time-varying constitutive/flux closure as a posterior distribution, with the conservation law imposed as a hard constraint so that uncertainty propagates and missing states are reconstructed from sparse observations
brief_reason: The abstract embeds Bayesian Neural Networks inside exact partial differential equations that enforce mass conservation, treating the unknown constitutive relations as latent quantities inferred with propagated uncertainty from sparse data — i.e., a constrained Bayesian inverse problem over a transport equation.
